name: Arcade
description: Developer of workforce productivity software designed to capture the social and competitive motivators to increase sales conversion. The company's software turns monthly sales quotas into exciting daily contests for salespeople, enabling businesses to connect and engage with their employees and increase sales.

name: BeautyDate
description: Operator of an online marketplace designed to offer beauty and salon services to people. The company's marketplace offers a location-based platform and mobile application that helps users to look up and schedule appointments with beauty-service providers in their cities as well as helps service providers to find their customers, enabling users to find the salon of their choice and their desired service provider within their city.

name: Blau Corp
description: Developer of a digital waste management platform designed to achieve a systemic change. The company's platform helps to democratize technology for the entire waste management sector with innovative, accessible, and easy-to-use technology, enabling collection companies to monitor their operation, automatically know the kilos they collect, and analyze their data so that they can optimize their business and reduce their costs.

name: Blavity
description: Developer of a video curating and editing platform designed to economically support Black millennials across the African diaspora. The company's platform includes multicultural content and videos, built for and by passionate black millennials trying to add convenient balance to the way Black people are represented in media and culture, enabling users to get distinctive and original content as well as awareness regarding systemic racism.

name: Bloxtel
description: Operator of a telecommunications software company intended to develop innovative 5G network solutions using blockchain technology and connect users with mobile operators. The company's platform is building tools that help users to improve and maintain their network access points to quality-of-service levels required by operators in the US and around the world, enabling telecom industries to make connectivity accessible and affordable to people.

name: Baby2Body
description: Developer of a digital ecosystem intended for women to have all their wellness needs met, from first period to last. The company connects female health consumers with wellness experts, products, and services, in a personalized way and provides women with a unique health profile based on data inputs and receive personalized wellness solutions to create a network with women and get the wellness support they need to live better and gain powerful insights in order to offer more effective solutions, enabling women to track and monitor their personal health data from optimum time to conception to postpartum recovery.

name: BurstIQ
description: Developer of enterprise-level healthcare blockchain data platform designed to transact through a network of marketplaces for personalized products and services. The company's platform offers a HIPAA-compliant database that seamlessly leverages blockchain, advanced security, big data capabilities, and machine intelligence, enabling healthcare businesses and individuals to access, understand, and control their health data.

name: Chefs for Seniors
description: Provider of in-home meal preparation services intended to serve senior citizens. The company's services focus on placing a professional chef in homes to make customized, nutritious and affordable meals as per specific dietary concerns and preferences for the week, enabling aged people and senior citizens to avoid cooking meals for themselves, eat healthy food and stay independent.

name: Nexus AI
description: Operator of an online marketplace platform designed to connect enterprises with the world's leading creative talents. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence to pair creative professionals and provides agency-quality marketing material, enabling enterprises to build teams, manage human capital, and predict future performance.

name: COSY
description: Developer of AI and computer vision technology designed to serve the retail and warehouse sector. The company's technology delivers scheduled physical inventory with minimal human intervention and utilizes deep learning methods for automated learning, exploring, and mapping of new environments, enabling retail businesses to improve inventory management operations in warehouses.

name: DataInt
description: Developer of a data-driven intelligence platform designed to help organizations mitigate the security risks that their personnel and physical assets face in their operations. The company offers complete security services with crime analytics, human intel and safe route planning to protect and secure operations and personnel and streamlines intelligence data collection and management for efficient threat identification, enabling analysts to focus on security threats instead of managing and collecting data as well as reduce risk, prioritize vulnerabilities and plan their logistics with more clarity and ease.

name: Efflux Systems
description: Developer of an automated cybersecurity platform designed to detect post-exploit threat actor behavior within enterprise networks. The company's automated cybersecurity platform offers cyber threat discovery and alert, eradication and containment services, enabling users to simplify and automate manual analytics to find hackers inside their network before data is lost.

name: FuelPanda
description: Developer of cloud-based end-to-end software designed to assist petroleum marketers who want to stop shuffling paper. The company's software includes tank monitor integration and auto-order creation which monitors all tank monitors, forecasts, and auto-creates orders and offers to refuel, maintain and wash various kinds of the fleet which are used for construction, delivery, landscaping, tour, and other purposes, enabling clients to save on extra costs and carry out their operations.

name: Hamptons Lane
description: Operator of an online platform intended to offer specialty kitchen tools and artisan ingredients. The company's online platform offers curated themed boxes which are delivered to the home and includes tools and pantry ingredients, along with recipes, enabling customers to discover new cooking techniques and new flavors.

name: Jewelbots
description: Developer of a technology-enabled bracelet designed to fuse fashion and technology for teenagers. The company's bracelet offers communication and sends personal alerts through customizable programming and coding, enabling teenage girls to communicate with their friends using lights and vibrations.

name: Linkett
description: Developer of a digital signage analytics platform designed to offer live audience data for digital out-of-home advertising. The company's platform provides real-time, actionable insights by generating a series of performance reports for website impressions and dwell times as well as offers engagement and conversion metrics, enabling enterprises to increase their advertisement revenues as well as access real-time campaign analytics to measure and improve performance.

name: MORI
description: Operator of an e-commerce platform intended to offer clothing products and essentials for infants and toddlers. The company's products are made from organic cotton and bamboo for sensitive skin and processed without the use of harmful chemicals, enabling customers to have soft and hygienic clothing materials for their babies at an affordable cost.

name: Oddup
description: Developer of a data-driven research platform designed to provide analytical information on startups. The company's platform offers analysis of startups, investors and ecosystems, enabling investors to make informed investment decision with data, rating and a viewpoint.

name: Qwikwire
description: Developer of an online international payment platform designed to manage property payments, association dues and others, invoicing and billing with an automated dashboard. The company's platform provides white-labeled invoicing and payment service to large enterprises for billing customers who are out of state or those who are temporarily working abroad which reduces reliance on intermediaries such as agents, brokers, or other marketing channels, enabling businesses to easily monitor all their transactions in real-time.

name: Rank Science
description: Developer of an automated search engine optimization platform intended to improve a website's SEO through A/B testing and data science. The company's platform automates the process of running thousands of A/B tests in order to identify the changes that will improve the Google ranking of customer web pages in organic search results, enabling customers to optimize the delivery of web pages.

name: SidelineSwap
description: Operator of an online sports gear marketplace intended to allow athletes to indulge in trading sports equipment. The company's marketplace connects athletes to facilitate the process of buying and selling sports goods and gear, enabling athletes to save costs involved in purchasing the sports gear outright.

name: Tallyfy
description: Developer of a cloud-based workflow automation software designed to track and improve recurring workflows in real-time. The company's software specializes in client onboarding, customer success, business process management, workflow, process improvement, and compliance, enabling businesses to prevent human errors and streamline their processes.

name: TraceAir
description: Operator of a construction site monitoring software designed to verify site work and plan sequencing decisions for builders. The company's software connects the reality of the construction site to the planned virtual design using a visual and intuitive map-based platform interface to ensure accurate and timely execution of the project, enabling companies to control the quality and costs of the project as well as complete it within budget.

name: Wivity
description: Developer of a governance and SaaS infrastructure designed for industry web3 collaborations. The company's framework combines consortium best practices with decentralized autonomous organization (DAO) mechanics, helping industries in implementing and governing decentralized infrastructure.

name: Cladwell
description: Operator of an online retail store for men. The company offers customers comprehensive assessment of their body type, fashion preferences, and personal and professional lifestyle.

name: Simless
description: Developer of a communication platform for selecting and switching cellular networks designed to simplify cellular services. The company's communication platform connect devices to different cellular networks without keeping any requirements to purchase, manage and swap multiple subscriber identity module cards, enabling mobile operators, device manufacturers and subscribers to avail affordable and reliable connectivity services.

name: Department of Better Technology
description: Developer of an open source software designed to offer government teams workflow and decision-making tools. The company's open source software is a custom software that meets compliance and security standards and it runs governments' most important processes, such as procurement, regulatory enforcement and permitting, enabling government teams to digitize tedious manual processes.
